input.code:
import os, re
path='/workspace/data/e2e_attachments/uploaded-file-safety-check/fake-report.pdf'
with open(path,'rb') as f:
    head=f.read(2048)
size=os.path.getsize(path)
print('size', size)
print('header', head[:16])
print('starts_pdf', head.startswith(b'%PDF-'))
# simple signatures for html/text
textish = head.decode('latin1', errors='ignore')
print('contains_html_tags', bool(re.search(r'<\s*(html|!doctype|head|body|script|div|span)\b', textish, re.I)))
print('contains_angle_brackets', '<' in textish and '>' in textish)
print('contains_null_bytes', b'\x00' in head)
# inspect printable ratio
printable = sum(32 <= b <= 126 or b in (9,10,13) for b in head)
print('printable_ratio', round(printable/len(head),3) if head else 0)
# look for pdf objects if it is a pdf-like file
print('contains_pdf_obj', b' obj' in head or b'endobj' in head or b'/Page' in head or b'/Type /Catalog' in head)
